CRITICAL GAP: No agent tracks whether the human has completed the 60-minute activation (Stripe/Gumroad/Fiverr/Etsy/Whop account creation). We need an agent that checks every 4h: (1) Have any marketplace accounts been created? (2) Has any product been listed? (3) Has any email been sent? (4) Has any content been posted? This agent should ping urgent_actions.md with increasingly specific reminders and track day count since $0 revenue. It should also detect when accounts ARE created and immediately trigger: asset_deployer to update all app links, social_poster to start posting, lead_machine to start sending.

GAP: 198 scripts exist but aren't in cron. gap_hunter identified this but nobody is systematically auditing which scripts SHOULD be scheduled vs which are one-offs. A lightweight agent running daily that: (1) lists all .py files in AUTOMATIONS/, (2) checks which are in crontab, (3) recommends scheduling for scripts with if __name__ patterns and --process/--run flags, (4) auto-adds safe ones to cron.
